nasb.text: Then Gideon built an altar there to the Lord and named it The Lord is Peace. To this day it is still in Ophrah of the Abiezrites.

esv.text: Then Gideon built an altar there to the Lord and called it, The Lord Is Peace. To this day it still stands at Ophrah, which belongs to the Abiezrites.

cnv.text: 基甸就在那裡給耶和華築了一座祭壇，稱為耶和華沙龍；直到今日，這壇還在亞比以謝族的俄弗拉。

ccb.text: 基甸在那里为耶和华筑了一座坛，称之为“耶和华赐平安”。这坛如今仍在亚比以谢族的俄弗拉。
